text:
Market today: Tech is getting hit hard again. AI stocks tumbling, Micron dropping 5%, and an OpenAI IPO delay are all feeding the same story: growth/AI names are under pressure. This is exactly the environment where your concentrated, margin-heavy book bleeds fast.

Your holdings: PLTR is the most urgent — down 17.56% and on SELL signal, stop at 85, still 20+ points away but sentiment is working against you. AVGO is your largest position, down 13.18% on TRIM signal — size alone makes this dangerous on margin. SPCX is a brand-new, very volatile IPO with almost no track record; small move against you hits the stop at 150 fast. Margin amplifies every one of these drops.

Watch: 1) How broad tech closes today — if CRWD and SMH crack, your HOLDs turn into problems quickly. 2) AVGO price action specifically — largest position on margin in a chip rout is your biggest dollar risk.

Bottom line: Your immediate job is protecting AVGO and PLTR before a bad day becomes a portfolio-defining loss.
